description: 1-layer 1-head transformer; token & position one-hot embeddings in disjoint subspaces; attention uses position-only Q/K to route each output step to a fixed source position and copies the source token one-hot via identity V/W_o; MLP zeroed.

Canonical clean version: 1-layer 1-head, d_model=V+L=51, one-hot token/pos embeddings in disjoint subspaces, position-only Q/K with attn-scale=2 routes each output step to its source, V/W_o copy token one-hot, MLP zeroed, head-scale=1.
Position-routing; very large attn-scale=100 so softmax is exact permutation.
Position-routing; very large attn-scale=200 so softmax is exact permutation.
